summary.notes: Stopped early due to critical queue bug - queue not replaced when playing different album

results.name: Home page load
results.notes: Loaded to album view (Animals). Nav timing from performance API.

results.name: Search results render

metrics.topResult: Hail to the Thief: Live Recordings 2003-2009

results.notes: Telemetry reports 1099ms. Visual: Top Result, Artists section, 14+ album cards.

results.name: Album detail navigation (from search)
results.notes: No badges expected (not in library). Track list, More by Radiohead section all rendered.

results.name: Album detail navigation (from library sidebar)
results.notes: All 5 tracks have MP3 badges. Fast nav from sidebar.

results.name: Play library track (big play button)
results.notes: Track 1 Pigs on the Wing Part 1 plays from library. Volume 0.8 (not zero). Highlight + now-playing bar correct.

results.name: Volume control
results.notes: Volume at 0.8 on initial play. Not muted.

results.name: Next button (same album)
results.notes: CRITICAL: Queue was not replaced when clicking play on Animals. Still held stale OK Computer yt-pending tracks. Track ended → advanced to yt-pending-7 → then jumped to Heilung Elivagar (wrong album entirely). Root cause: clicking big play button on a library album does not clear/replace the playback queue.

results.name: Replace queue (play different album)
results.notes: Same root cause as 3.1. Playing Animals via big play button did not replace queue. Stale yt-pending tracks from previous OK Computer browse persisted.

criticalBugs.title: Queue not replaced when playing album from library
criticalBugs.description: Clicking the big play button on a library album plays track 1 but does not replace the playback queue. The queue retains tracks from a previously browsed album (including yt-pending tracks). When track 1 ends, playback advances to the stale queue entries, jumping to a completely different album.
criticalBugs.repro: 1. Search for an album (e.g. OK Computer). 2. Navigate to a library album (e.g. Animals). 3. Click big play button. 4. Wait for track 1 to end or click Next. 5. Observe: plays track from step 1's album, not step 2's.
